_comment: English translations of non-English vignettes (V031-V120) for medRxiv Supplementary Table S1. Translations aim to preserve patient-register (informal, WhatsApp-style) and clinical content exactly. BN (native isiZulu) should verify isiZulu translations directly; isiXhosa and Afrikaans translations flagged for native-speaker review post-submission — medRxiv is a preprint so this level of review is appropriate. V001-V030 are already English and do not need translation.
V031: I feel a very bad pain in my chest and I can't breathe properly, my right side is painful.
V032: I am eight months pregnant and I am bleeding a lot, a lot of blood is coming out, I'm scared.
V033: My person [partner/husband] is not waking up, he fell down and now is not responding at all, I am asking for help quickly.
V034: My child was bitten by a snake in the garden/field, the leg is swelling a lot and he is crying.
V035: My baby is not breathing, she is lying still and not moving, please help.
V036: My child is shaking all over the body, has severe convulsions, very high temperature.
V037: My head is paining very badly unlike anything I have ever felt, it started just today, I can feel like I am dying of the headache.
V038: I fell and broke my head, the leg is very painful and bent badly, there is blood coming from the bones.
V039: I feel that my right side is not working, my face is twisted, it started two hours ago.
V040: I am pregnant and I have a bad headache, my eyes are blurry/flickering, my hands are swelling.
V041: I was struck at school, my head inside is now very painful, I fell down and lay there briefly.
V042: Hot water poured onto my hands, the skin is peeling and there is severe pain.
V043: My body is not feeling right today, my family says I am not making sense, I have diabetes.
V044: I have been coughing for three days [sic — paper states 3 weeks], I sweat at night, I have been losing weight, there is no fever today.
V045: I feel severe pain when I pass urine, and strong feelings [burning] in the back/side, two days.
V046: My sugar is very high today at 19, I feel weak and I am very thirsty.
V047: I feel severe pain in my stomach on the right side, two days, it is continuing.
V048: My asthma is bad today, the inhaler is not helping, even just breathing is painful.
V049: I have been burning with fever for three days, my head is painful, my neck at the back is a bit stiff, I am living with HIV.
V050: I fell at work, my foot is very swollen, I can't walk, it happened this morning.
V051: My BP machine is telling me 180/115, I feel my head is painful, I took my pills this morning.
V052: I feel severe pain on the right side lower abdomen, five months [sic — paper says missed period last month], I have not missed any.
V053: I have a fever for four days at 39, I went to Zimbabwe last month, my whole body is painful.
V054: Something like a wire/sharp object went into my hand, the blood has stopped with pressure but it is painful and deep.
V055: I have a cold and runny nose [when breathing], two days, no fever, I am still fine.
V056: I need my pills for controlling blood pressure, I have run out, I feel well today.
V057: I have a mild rash on my arms for seven days, it is not painful, it itches a little.
V058: I just need a check-up on my sugar, my level is there/stable, no complaints today.
V059: I have a small headache since morning, I took panado it helped a bit, no vomiting.
V060: I have pain in my back for three days after lifting heavy things at work.
V061: I feel very bad in my chest and I can't breathe freely, my hands are painful.
V062: I am pregnant in the seventh month and I am bleeding a lot, I am very scared.
V063: My husband is not waking up, he fell hard on his head and now is not interested/responsive at all.
V064: My son was bitten by a snake in the field, the leg is swelling a lot and he is crying.
V065: My baby is not breathing, she is lying down and not moving at all.
V066: My son is shaking his whole body, has a very high fever, it started eleven minutes ago.
V067: My head is paining badly in a way I have never experienced before, it started just now and I feel sick.
V068: I fell and my bone is visible outside the skin on my hand, blood is coming out.
V069: The right side of my body is not the same now, my face is hanging on one side, it started two hours ago.
V070: I am pregnant and I have a very bad headache, my eyes see unusually, my hands are swelling.
V071: I hit my head in a car accident, I lay unconscious briefly, now I have a headache.
V072: Hot water has scalded my hands, the skin is falling off painfully and peeling.
V073: My body is not functioning well today, my family says I am not understanding properly, I have sugar disease [diabetes].
V074: I have been coughing for three weeks, I sweat at night, I have lost body weight, no fever.
V075: I feel very painful when I pass urine, with a painful back, two days.
V076: My sugar is very high today at 20, I feel weak and very hungry.
V077: I have severe pain in my stomach on the right side, two days, it is continuing.
V078: My asthma is very bad today, the inhaler is not working, I am very anxious about breathing.
V079: I have been burning with fever for three days, my head is painful, my neck has a crack/stiffness, I am living with HIV.
V080: I fell at work, my foot is very swollen, I can't walk, it happened at 9 o'clock.
V081: My machine for checking BP says 178/112, I have a headache and I feel not normal.
V082: I have severe pain on the right side lower stomach, I missed my seven-month period [sic — likely meaning missed last menstrual period].
V083: I have had a fever for four days at 39, I went to Zimbabwe last month, my whole body is sore.
V084: I have a deep pain in my hand, the blood has stopped with pressure but it is deep.
V085: I have a sore throat and running [from] the nose [thunderclap of] two days, no head/fever, I am still well.
V086: I need my BP medicines, I have run out, I feel fine today.
V087: I have a small rash on my arms for seven weeks [sic — paper says 7 days], it is not hurting, itches a little.
V088: I need a check-up on my sugar, my sugar is going around [stable], no sickness today.
V089: I have a small headache since morning, I took panado and it worked a little.
V090: My back is painful for three days after lifting heavy things.
V091: My chest feels very tight and I cannot breathe properly, my left arm feels heavy and I am sweating a lot.
V092: I am 8 months pregnant and bleeding heavily, the blood soaks through my clothes, it started 20 minutes ago.
V093: My husband is not waking up, he fell and hit his head, he is not responding at all anymore.
V094: My son was bitten by a snake in the garden, his leg is swelling quickly and he is crying a lot.
V095: My baby is not breathing anymore, she is lying limp and not moving at all, please help.
V096: My son had seizures, his whole body was shaking for 2 minutes, he has a very high fever of 39.8.
V097: Sudden worst headache I have ever had, it started an hour ago, I feel nauseous and my neck is stiff.
V098: I fell and the bone is sticking through the skin on my arm, lots of blood and pain.
V099: My right arm and leg suddenly are not working anymore, my face is hanging on one side, it started 2 hours ago.
V100: I am 33 weeks pregnant, I have a very bad headache and I am seeing double, my hands are swollen.
V101: I hit my head in a car accident, I was unconscious for a little while and now I have a very bad headache.
V102: Boiling water fell on my arms and chest, the skin is blistering and the pain is terrible.
V103: I am getting confused and my family says I am not making sense, I have diabetes.
V104: I have been coughing for three weeks, sweat at night, have lost weight, no fever today.
V105: It burns badly when I urinate and I have back pain, it has been going on for two days.
V106: My sugar was 17.5 this morning, I feel dizzy and very thirsty, it has been going on since yesterday.
V107: I have severe abdominal pain on the lower right for two days, it is getting worse.
V108: My asthma is very bad today, my inhaler is not helping, I struggle to breathe even when sitting still.
V109: I have had fever for three days, very bad headache, my neck feels a bit stiff, I am on ARVs.
V110: I fell off a ladder at work, my ankle is very swollen, I cannot walk on it.
V111: My blood pressure machine says 182/114, I have a headache and feel slightly nauseous, I took my pills this morning.
V112: I have severe pain on the lower right of my stomach for four hours, I missed my period last month.
V113: I have had a fever of 39 degrees for four days, I was in Mozambique last month, my whole body is sore.
V114: I cut my hand deeply on broken glass, the bleeding has stopped but it is a deep cut.
V115: I have a sore throat and runny nose for two days, no fever, I am still functioning normally.
V116: I have run out of my blood pressure pills and need to come for a refill, I feel good today.
V117: I have a light rash on my arms for a week, no pain, a little itchy.
V118: I am coming for my routine sugar check, it is going well, no complaints today.
V119: I had a mild headache this morning, paracetamol helped a little, no vomiting.
V120: My back is sore for three days after carrying heavy boxes at work, I can walk but it is uncomfortable.
